name: Fresh Lemon Tartelettes- Le Ruth's
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream the sugar, butter, and margarine with a mixer until smooth.
2. Add the egg yolk and blend well.
3. Gradually add the flour and salt, blending until the mixture comes together.
4. Add the water and continue to blend until fully incorporated.
5. Cover the dough and refrigerate for at least 4 hours to allow it to rest and soften.
6. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
7. Line 18 small, round tartelette pans (each about 2-1/2 inches wide) with the prepared crust. This will yield approximately 3 per person.
8. Fill each tartelette with the filling and bake until crisp, about 45 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and allow to cool before serving.
